name: Gradient
notes: Gradient Ventures is Google's AI-focused early-stage venture fund. Website is gradient.google. Commonly listed as Mountain View, CA (Google HQ area).

name: Bessemer
notes: Bessemer Venture Partners. Primary VC office at 889 Winslow St, Suite 500, Redwood City, CA. Some sources list San Francisco. Domain is bvp.com.

name: Index
notes: Index Ventures is headquartered in London, UK (registered there since 2002; originally founded in Geneva 1996). Has US offices in San Francisco and NYC but HQ is London.

name: Lead Out
notes: Interpreted as Leadout Capital (leadoutcapital.com), headquartered in Portola Valley, CA 94028. Name in CRM is 'Lead Out' which matches 'Leadout Capital'.

name: A.Capital
notes: A.Capital Ventures, founded by Ronny Conway and Ramu Arunachalam in 2014. Office at 100 Pine Street, Suite 3300, San Francisco, CA.

name: Matchstick
notes: Matchstick Ventures, early-stage VC firm. Primary HQ in Minneapolis, MN; secondary office in Boulder, CO.

name: Riverpark Ventures (Seamless founder)
notes: RiverPark Ventures, run by Andy Appelbaum (co-founder of Seamless). HQ at 156 West 56th Street, 17th Floor, New York, NY 10019.

name: Goodwater
notes: Goodwater Capital, headquartered at 240 Lorton Ave Fl 3, Burlingame, CA 94010.

name: Foundry Group
notes: Foundry Group, early-stage VC firm founded 2007, headquartered at 1050 Walnut St, Boulder, CO. Website moved to foundry.vc.

name: General Mills
notes: General Mills HQ is at One General Mills Boulevard, Golden Valley, MN (suburb of Minneapolis). Mailing address sometimes listed as Minneapolis, MN 55426.

name: Revolution
notes: Revolution LLC, Steve Case's investment firm, headquartered in Washington, D.C. Founded 2005.

name: Nikita Bier
notes: Nikita Bier is an individual entrepreneur and angel investor (founded TBH, Gas; now Head of Product at X). Not a company — no HQ, website, or domain to assign. CRM record likely represents him as a contact/investor rather than a firm.
